title: Claude Fable 5 simulates the solar system and predicts a solar eclipse
summary: Claude Fable 5 built a solar system simulation by deriving orbital motion from physics first principles and used it to predict solar eclipses. This demonstrates the model's ability to apply physics reasoning to complex dynamical systems.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 constructing a solar system simulation by deriving orbital motion from physics first principles rather than relying on prebuilt formulas, then using that simulation to predict solar eclipses. The point is to demonstrate the model applying physics reasoning to a complex dynamical system and producing a verifiable prediction. Key takeaways: the model handles world simulation grounded in physical laws, and it chains that reasoning into a concrete forecast (the timing of an eclipse).
